ddt:Target.Name: FrRadar_C1ARun2_SW8.1.4
ddt:Target.Description:
03/05/2021 Update of the DID $2049 + Update of the auto-identification parameter
20/04/2021 Update daimler issue link to the lenght of two DIDs $F011 and 31010202
04/11/2020 Update daimler issue link to request ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTCSnapshotIdentification and ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTCSnapshotIdentification Due to electrobit stack the size of the DID on DRC 14 (Ex : F194 / F195 / F1A8)are bigger. Fix on the electrobit is not requested.
08/10/2020 yaw and pitch for the SDA was with a ratio of 1 instead of 100 (==> angle where display like this 96 instead of 0,96)
21/09/2020 Amor MAMI(akka) Adding maintenability for the snapshot. Checking the auto-identification parameter
-08/09/2020 Amor Mami Fix DW activation screen Fix snapshot issues : signed parameter, update snapshot etc Update screen configuration Maintenability report added on all Parameters needed DID official Read/write updated
-10/07/2020 Amor MAmi_carlos flores-oliveira SDA screen updated All signed value updated DTC updated AEB DID updated with ST7 Did resources file (Bit and offset correction) Auto identification uptodate until end of the project
-24/04/2020 AMOR MAMI Add new requests from Diag time for the routine after sales
12/03 17h -4/03/2020 AMOR MAMI Add of new DTC ST6 Update screens Update for signed value (linked to screen using Signed DIDs)
- 3/03/2020 - Amor MAMI_ Anna Minou Correction of the data base with new checker rules
- 23/07/2019 - Amor MAMI DDT Database update with Diagnostic file Ref 17 V6.4 Screen creation and update Requests and Labels created Check of the database done(some warning corrected) Auto identification added will be available after SW6
- 05/07/2019 - I. MARQUES - Screens for AEB configuration added.
- 19/04/2019 - JMGALLEGO - Screens for configuration DID added.
- 08/03/2019 - JMGALLEGO- Diagnosis resources file v4.7 - DID update for CDV. - DTC update for CDV. - Implementation of DID list for SUV. - Implementation of DTC list for SUV.
- 26/10/2018 - Amor MAMI/JMGALLEGO - Creation of the database.

Item.Text: Alignment conditions not ready Vehicle moving?or vehicle speed?0km/h?

Data.Name: Param_Sensor.LongiMountingPosRadarSensor
Data.Comment: Configuration DID for the Sensor changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: Param_Sensor.LateraliMountingPosRadarSensor
Data.Comment: Configuration DID for the Sensor changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: Param_Sensor.ElevationMountingPosRadarSensor
Data.Comment: Configuration DID for the Sensor changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: Param_Sensor.CoverDamping
Data.Comment: DID configuration changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: Plant_AEB_deactivation
Data.Comment: Parameter that allows to deactivate AEB function during factory process. This DID should bypass all

Data.Name: Service_Static_Alignment_checking.Horiz_Alignment_value_on_EEPROM
Data.Comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the measured offset at factory

Data.Name: Service_Static_Alignment_checking.Vert_Alignment_value_on_EEPROM
Data.Comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the measured offset at factory

Data.Name: Service_Static_Alignment_checking.Horiz_Alignment_value_on_EEPROM_2
Data.Comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the current offset after RunTime

Data.Name: Service_Static_Alignment_checking.Vert_Alignment_value_on_EEPROM_2
Data.Comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the current offset after Run Time

Data.Name: V_m_DistanceObject00
Data.Comment: Distance between Object 0 and host vehicle

Data.Name: F_x_DW_Failure
Data.Comment: Flag true if DW is in Failure

Data.Name: SupplierFaultCode
Data.Description:
EventUniqueId Signals Name DTC 842 AEB_CameraStatus --> PERMANENT_SIGNAL DTC_FrCamera_channel_2_Invalid_Data 0x659786 841 AEB_CameraStatus -->TEMPORARY_DM10_SIGNAL DTC_FrCamera_channel_2_Invalid_Data This is can 2

DistanceTotalizer UNAVAILABLE VALUE 534 VDC_A8 JT1 TO 731 VDC_A8 JT2 TO 742 WheelSpeedFR UNAVAILABLE VALUE 536 WheelSpeedFL UNAVAILABLE VALUE 537 VehicleSpeedClock CLK ERROR 17 VehicleSpeedCRC CRC ERROR 117 VDC_A9 JT1 TO 732 VDC_A9 JT2 TO 743 this is can 1

Data.Name: Fingerprint
Data.Comment: "The FingerPrint is used by the ECU using the Security Access for the reprogramming process or write

Data.Name: IndexSrvData
Data.Comment: The IndexSrvData is one of information which is used by the offboard tools to unlock the ECU.

Data.Name: Operationnal_Reference
Data.Comment: "The operational reference shall correspond to ECU final state. To simplify, the operational referen

Data.Name: Secondary_Operationnal_Reference
Data.Comment: the secondary operational reference equals to the secondary software file reference delivered by sup

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber_DAI
Data.Comment: "The VehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber_DAI (F1.11) shall be implemented ONLY by all ECU designed

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber_DAI
Data.Comment: "This reference corresponds to the reference to the pdx file, which will be download in plant or in

Data.Name: Vehicle_manufacturer_Kit_Assembly_Part_Number
Data.Comment: "If a part includes an electronic part, with its own reference, plus a mechanical part and if the OE

Data.Name: TimeOut_Tunning
Data.Comment: "Allows to modify the time out for the routine in aftersales alignment, default value = 15m. Tunnin

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Abnormal value [Out of range or wrong value or not used]
Abnormal value [Out of range or wrong value or not used]
Abnormal value [Out of range or wrong value or not used]
Abnormal value [Out of range or wrong value or not used]
Abnormal value [Out of range or wrong value or not used]
Abnormal value [Out of range or wrong value or not used]
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used
Abnormal value Out of range or wrong value or not used

Data.Name: Param_veh_1.Stability_Factor
Data.Comment: s^2/m^2 est l unité de ce parametre (New checker don t take into account this unit )

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.cBETA
Data.Comment: rad * s^2 /m est l unité de ce parametre (New checker don t take into account this unit )

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.dVehicleWidthMax
Data.Comment: changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.dVehicleWidthMin
Data.Comment: changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.dxvFrontBumper
Data.Comment: changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.dxvMountPosAxSensor
Data.Comment: changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.dxvRearBumper
Data.Comment: changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.lWheelTrack(average)
Data.Comment: changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.Typical_velocity
Data.Comment: changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: Param_veh_2.Wheel_Base
Data.Comment: changed to signed on the new version 09/03/2020

Data.Name: LSS_Parameters.LSS.Max_TTC_OnComing_Objects
Data.Comment: Configuration of TTC on comming object
Data.Description: TTC for LSS : The default value is 3sec

Data.Name: LSS_Parameters.LSS.TS_Min_EgoVehicleSpeed
Data.Comment: Configuration DID for the Min EgoVehicle speed
Data.Description: Min Ego Vh speed for LSS : The default value is 30 Kph

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Yaw rate to high and Velocity to low
Location number not sufficient; Ego velocity too low
Location number not sufficient; Ego yaw rate too high
Location number not sufficient; Ego yaw rate too high; Ego velocity too low
Location number not sufficient; Ego acceleration to high
Location number not sufficient; Ego acceleration to high; Ego yaw rate too high
Location number not sufficient; Ego acceleration to high; Ego yaw rate too high; Ego velocity too low
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery
Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: ConfigurationDataReferenceAfterConfigurationProcess
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Label.Text: /!\ AEB DID is not available out of devellopement DID after SW6
1-Vehicle information must be send on the Can network
Distance between mirror high and ground: 8cm
Position of the mirror: 0° in azimuth and elevation
Angles of the radar(if executed correctly without error) :
Step 3 SDA final status(if failled redo Step 1/ After doing a Key off/on) :

Button.Text: Step 2 press : SDA Status(31030202) until progress bar is 100 %
